text:
is the daughter of Willy Tybur.

Appearance

Fine is a young girl with light hair that is kept behind her head a low bun. She wears a dress with long and puffy sleeves and an embroidered collar.

Story

Marley arc

When the Tybur family arrives in Liberio following the Marley Mid-East War, Fine joins her family to take up residence within the headquarters.
